input.topic: The great rivers of India — following the Ganga from Gangotri glacier to the Sundarbans delta, understanding how rivers shape land, agriculture and cities along the way. NCERT Class 7 Geography 'Our Changing Earth'.
Volcanoes and earthquakes around the Pacific Ring of Fire — why plate boundaries produce mountains, tsunamis and eruptions, for Class 9 students studying the structure of the Earth.

A heritage tour of ancient Indian monuments — Ajanta caves, Konark Sun Temple, Hampi ruins and the Sanchi Stupa — to show Class 5 students how people built magnificent structures without modern machines.
